examples.title: Loading state
examples.description: A line chart with reserved layout while data loads.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { LineChart } from 'cinder/line-chart';
</script>

<LineChart label="Loading revenue" loading series={[]} />

examples.title: Activation funnel
examples.description: A multi-series line chart comparing signups and activations.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { LineChart } from 'cinder/line-chart';

  const series = [
    {
      id: 'signups',
      label: 'Signups',
      data: [
        { x: 'Week 1', y: 84 },
        { x: 'Week 2', y: 96 },
        { x: 'Week 3', y: 112 },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: 'activated',
      label: 'Activated',
      data: [
        { x: 'Week 1', y: 42 },
        { x: 'Week 2', y: 58 },
        { x: 'Week 3', y: 71 },
      ],
    },
  ];
</script>

<LineChart label="Activation funnel" {series} />

examples.title: Revenue trend
examples.description: A single-series line chart for monthly recurring revenue.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { LineChart } from 'cinder/line-chart';

  const series = [
    {
      id: 'revenue',
      label: 'Revenue',
      data: [
        { x: 'Jan', y: 120 },
        { x: 'Feb', y: 148 },
        { x: 'Mar', y: 172 },
        { x: 'Apr', y: 196 },
      ],
    },
  ];
</script>

<LineChart label="Monthly recurring revenue" {series} dataTableVisibility="visible" />
